name: Jeff Buckley
title: Jeff Buckley - taken 5/29/97 died later that day on 5/29/97, 30
description: Jeff Buckley - taken 5/29/97 died later that day on 5/29/97, 30
bio: Jeff Buckley was an American singer-songwriter and guitarist known for his ethereal voice and critically acclaimed album "Grace". His rendition of Leonard Cohen's "Hallelujah" is considered one of the greatest covers ever recorded.
